---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Aurora
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# Feature Request


## Feature Description

Describe the feature you would like to see.


## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

Why is this valuable for Aurora?


## Proposed Solution

Describe your idea.

How should this feature work?


## Alternative Solutions

Are there other possible approaches?

Explain alternatives you considered.


## Architecture Consideration

Which Engine does this feature belong to?

Possible examples:

- Audio Engine
- Visualization Engine
- Lyrics Engine
- AI Engine
- Plugin Engine
- UI Engine
- Other


Does this require:

- [ ] New Engine
- [ ] Existing Engine extension
- [ ] New interface
- [ ] New event
- [ ] Architecture discussion


## Documentation

Should this feature require documentation updates?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No


## Additional Context

Add screenshots, examples, references, or other information.
